chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 844 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case For hearing of MA 10906/25 For hearing of MA 10907/25 Applicant present in person Applicant is present in person, although his counsel is not present. He says that he has settled the dispute with the respondents and that he does not wish to press this application any further. Accordingly this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
